parameters.name: create_route_public_transport_vienna
parameters.description: Create a routing plan with the Vienna public transport system. Provide a destination address (street and house number, no zip code, no city) and the arrival time (when the user should arrive). Parameters: destination_address (street and house number), arrival_time (time in HH:MM:SS format), start_station_id (optional, defaults to Gasometer)

value.destination_address: ={{ $fromAI('destination_address', 'Destination street and house number (no zip code, no city)', 'string') }}

schema.description: Destination street and house number (no zip code, no city)
Desired arrival time in HH:MM:SS format
